game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
"DRAPLINE" is a roguelite training game where you raise a dragon girl who eats anything and train her to become the strongest in one year. Feed her a variety of things to increase her abilities, combine various skills to build your own strategy, and defeat the impending catastrophe!

Raise the Divine Dragon You’ve Nurtured to Overcome the Catastrophe!

"DRAPLINE" is a roguelite training game where you raise a dragon girl who eats anything and train her to become the strongest in one year. With the game’s ending achievable in as little as about one hour, you can enjoy multiple playthroughs and experiment with various training strategies.

Raising the Dragon Girl

To prevent the impending World's Doom in one year, you must raise a dragon girl known as the "Divine Dragon." This food-loving dragon eats anything and transforms it into her own power. Meat, fish, rocks, iron... no, even lava, mountains, and other people's houses become fine delicacies in her eyes.

Battle Against the Catastrophe

A mysterious enemy stands in your way, intent on bringing about the end of the world. Will you fight with powerful attacks? Use defense and healing skills? Or weaken them gradually with poison? Combine over 100 different skills to create synergies and build your own unique strategy.

Your Unique Growth Through Nurturing

The Divine Dragon is a pure being, just born. It’s not only her strength you must nurture, but her heart as well. Depending on how you raise her, her appearance and personality will change over time. The people she interacts with and the way she spends her year will determine the various possible endings to the story. Ultimately, the truth behind the "calamity" may also be revealed.

However, the Divine Dragon eats "anything".
If you raise her the wrong way...

About the Author：Kanawo

An indie game creator who develops games solo.

Continues to release popular titles, including "Noel the Mortal Fate," which was ported to Nintendo Switch™ / PlayStation®4 / Xbox in 2022 (available on Steam® since May 2018).

※All images are in development.
※As the game is still in development, proper nouns are subject to change.

DRAPLINE Streaming Guidelines

  • Streaming is OK!
    Feel free to stream on YouTube, Twitch, NicoNico, X, or any other platform.
    We’d really appreciate it if you could include a link to this page in your video description.

  • Monetization
    Using platform monetization features (e.g., YouTube Partner Program, Super Chat, etc.) is totally fine!

  • Notes
    Please refrain from doing anything illegal or anything that would bother others.
game_info.description: DRAPLINE is a roguelite dragon-raising adventure where you nurture a dragon girl by feeding her various items to build her strength over a year-long journey. Your goal is to train her to defeat the final catastrophe by strategically choosing food items that boost her stats. Feed her meat, fish, gems, and rare items to increase her power, health, and abilities. Each item provides different stat bonuses and unlocks new skills. Battle enemies in turn-based combat using your acquired skills, and reach the final boss to save the world!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys (↑↓): Navigate menus and select options
Space: Confirm selection / Use selected skill in battle
Z: Cancel / Return to previous menu
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (returns to title screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic menu navigation and feeding mechanics. Verifies that the player can navigate through the training menu, select food items, and successfully feed the dragon girl to increase her stats.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate to the feeding menu using arrow keys and space. Select various food items to feed the dragon. Verify that stats increase appropriately after feeding. Check that the game progresses through days correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The dragon's stats should increase after feeding. The day counter should progress. The game should transition smoothly between training and menu phases without errors. Stats should be tracked correctly in gameState.

TEST_1.strategy: Navigate to the feeding menu using arrow keys and space. Select various food items to feed the dragon. Verify that stats increase appropriately after feeding. Check that the game progresses through days correctly.
TEST_1.expected: The dragon's stats should increase after feeding. The day counter should progress. The game should transition smoothly between training and menu phases without errors. Stats should be tracked correctly in gameState.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the complete game loop from start to victory. Implements an optimal strategy to train the dragon efficiently and defeat the final catastrophe boss within the one-year timeframe.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Feed the dragon high-value items to maximize stat growth. Focus on balanced stat distribution (HP, Attack, Defense). Progress through training days efficiently. Battle enemies to gain experience and test combat skills. Reach and defeat the final boss with accumulated power.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The dragon should reach sufficient power levels to defeat the final boss. Game should transition to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Victory screen should display with appropriate message and final stats. No errors should occur during the full playthrough.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests combat mechanics thoroughly. Verifies that turn-based battles work correctly, skills function as intended, damage calculations are accurate, and win/lose conditions trigger properly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Enter battles and use different skills to test combat. Verify damage is calculated correctly. Test defensive skills and healing. Ensure enemy AI responds appropriately. Check that battles end correctly when HP reaches zero.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Combat should flow smoothly with correct turn order. Damage values should match expected calculations. Skills should have appropriate effects. Battle should end when either player or enemy HP reaches zero. Battle results should update gameState correctly.
TEST_3.description: Tests combat mechanics thoroughly. Verifies that turn-based battles work correctly, skills function as intended, damage calculations are accurate, and win/lose conditions trigger properly.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests edge cases and boundary conditions. Verifies game handles maximum stat values, day limits, inventory management, and various win/lose scenarios correctly.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Push stats to maximum values. Test behavior at day 365 limit. Verify game handles running out of resources. Test different paths to victory and defeat conditions.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Game should handle edge cases gracefully without crashes. Maximum values should be enforced. Time limit should trigger appropriate ending. All victory and defeat paths should work correctly.

TEST_4.expected: Game should handle edge cases gracefully without crashes. Maximum values should be enforced. Time limit should trigger appropriate ending. All victory and defeat paths should work correctly.
